speaker_id.description: Stable identifier for the speaker (e.g. speaker_1, speaker_2)

x.description: Horizontal center of speaker as fraction, 0.0=left edge 1.0=right edge

y.description: Vertical center of speaker as fraction, 0.0=top edge 1.0=bottom edge

description.description: Brief description of the speaker (e.g. host on the left, guest on the right)

time_sec.description: Timestamp of the scene change in seconds

description.description: Brief description of the scene transition
